## Checklist

- [ ] Edited canonical sources only (`core/`, `template/`) — ran `scripts/sync-adapters.sh` if so, and committed the regenerated files
- [ ] `scripts/sync-adapters.sh --check` passes locally
- [ ] Protocol changes preserve the accuracy contract (source-backed claims, explicit evidence-missing declarations)
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed (`README.md`, `docs/INSTALL.md`, `docs/TEAM_SETUP.md`)
